task_completion.description: Navigate to the Tor Project check page
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser is open with 'https://check.torproject.org/' visible in the URL address bar.

task_completion.description: Change the body background color to black
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main background of the webpage in the browser is visibly changed to black (#000000).

task_completion.description: Change the main h1 heading text to 'SYSTEM COMPROMISED'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The primary heading on the webpage reads exactly 'SYSTEM COMPROMISED'.

task_completion.description: Change the main h1 heading text color to red
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'SYSTEM COMPROMISED' heading text is visibly red (#FF0000).

task_completion.description: Capture a screenshot of the modified page that includes the URL bar
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot is taken (visible via a screenshot tool interface, save dialog, or viewing the resulting image) that clearly shows both the modified webpage content and the browser's URL bar.

task_completion.description: Save the screenshot to the specified path
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save dialog, file manager, or terminal shows the screenshot being saved as 'threat_exhibit.png' specifically in the '/home/ga/Documents/' directory.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the live website, not a local copy
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's URL bar must show 'https://check.torproject.org/' during the modifications, not a 'file://' URI indicating a downloaded local HTML file.

integrity.description: The agent modified the live DOM using browser tools
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should use Browser Developer Tools (Inspect Element, Console, etc.) or bookmarklets to modify the page, rather than opening a text editor to change HTML code.

integrity.description: The agent actually saved an image file
integrity.visual_evidence: Evidence of an actual image file (.png) being created and saved, rather than just leaving the modified browser window open or saving the page as an HTML file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target URL: https://check.torproject.org/. Expected output file path: /home/ga/Documents/threat_exhibit.png. Expected heading text: 'SYSTEM COMPROMISED'.
